name: reelier_scan
description: Discover replayable workflows in an agent's session history (defaults to ~/.claude/projects). Returns each session's transcript path — feed one to reelier_from_session. Only MCP/HTTP tool-call sequences are replayable; native file/shell actions are reported as skipped, never fabricated into a fake result.

dir.description: Directory to scan for agent session transcripts (default: ~/.claude/projects).

name: reelier_from_session
description: Compile a SKILL.md from a session transcript. Use when the work already happened (this session or by hand) — recording can't be retroactive. Get the transcriptPath from reelier_scan first. Returns the written skill's path, stats, and open questions — or, honestly, that nothing in the transcript was replayable.

transcriptPath.description: Path to a session transcript (.jsonl) to compile.

name.description: Skill name (also the default output filename stem).

out.description: Output path for the compiled SKILL.md (default: <cwd>/<name>.skill.md).

force.description: Overwrite an existing file at the output path.

name: reelier_replay
description: Run a skill file at Level 0 (deterministic replay, zero LLM calls) and return the real run record: per-step outcomes, timing, totals, and — when a step drifted — why (the failing assertion). Reproduces the recorded tool calls (MCP/HTTP) only. Read-only by default: 'idempotent-write' steps are held back unless allowWrites is passed.

skillPath.description: Path to a .skill.md file to run.

vars.description: Template variable bindings ({{name}} -> value) — e.g. a computed date window so a relative-date skill replays against the current period.

wrap.description: Downstream MCP server command line(s) to connect for MCP-tool steps.

cwd.description: Working directory the run record is written under (default: process cwd).

allowWrites.description: Allow 'idempotent-write' steps to execute. Default false — replay is read-only.

allowDestructive.description: Allow steps whose effect is 'destructive' to run.

name: reelier_diff
description: Compare two runs of the same skill and report SAME or DRIFTED — the drift-detector for a recorded baseline replayed on a schedule. Compares per-step outcomes, structure, and heal-level from .reelier/runs/<skill>.jsonl (defaults to the last two runs); data values that legitimately change run-to-run are not drift. Drifted steps carry why (the failing assertion).

skill.description: Skill name (the .reelier/runs/<skill>.jsonl stem) whose runs to compare.

baselineIndex.description: 0-based index of the baseline run (default: second-to-last).

candidateIndex.description: 0-based index of the candidate run (default: the last run).

cwd.description: Working directory where .reelier/ lives (default: process cwd).

name: reelier_push
description: Push a skill's local run records (and, on first push, the skill file) to Reelier Cloud, where each receipt gets a shareable permalink + verified-replay badge. Requires REELIER_CLOUD_URL/REELIER_CLOUD_KEY in env — reports skipped-no-key honestly when they're absent.

skillPath.description: Path to a .skill.md file whose run records should be pushed.

cwd.description: Working directory to resolve .reelier/ state under (default: process cwd).

dryRun.description: Report what would push; make no network calls, touch no state.

all.description: Ignore/reset the cursor — reconsider every record from the start.

withSkill.description: Upload the skill file even if it was already uploaded before.
